description:
Parent epic: V3 E2: Agents, chat turns, and sessions

Source task 6/10 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Remove any duplicate chat/session APIs that do not add value.

Epic closure criteria:
- `chat/3` is the one public turn primitive
- sessions are clearly addressing, not durability
- session and chat tests cover happy paths and edge cases

comments.text: Removed duplicate top-level chat_request/finalize_chat_request facade APIs. Kept chat/3 as the primary turn primitive, with explicit streaming and async request helpers where they serve distinct runtime use cases. Added public API tests to prevent Session.ask/3 and the removed facades from returning.

title: E2: Remove any duplicate chat/session APIs that do not add value
